Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
STA: +8 CHA: +8 WIS: +6
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10

WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: DRU ENC
Race: HUM ERU ELF HIE DEF HEF HFL GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

__DEL__1591749963719

184 posts
Yeah, but does it look like Cujo's Mask?


(For the "Hockey-Challenged," Cujo is the nickname of the Toronto Maple Leaf's Goalie ... hence this whole line about Canadians ...)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 22 2001 at 9:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what the original post ment was that a maple leaf is a canadian thing, thus it was a clever post, no need to go nation bashing here
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 22 2001 at 8:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why does this have anything to do with Canada? If there was a staff of the eagle should we say GO AMERICA? What you said it totally out of context.
RE: CANADIANS RULE
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2001 at 9:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
-Why does this have anything to do with Canada?
Haven't you ever seen their flag?
-If there was a staff of the eagle should we say GO AMERICA?
No, but a staff of the idiot... Now thats American.
I think you need to camp the Undead Jester in Kurns Tower for awhile. I heard he drops the "a sense of humor" magic lore no drop -50 to your save vs laughter.
Relax it's a game and people are rarely serious. If they are serious these people posting have some serious reality issues. For all those pissed that think I flamed your country. I'm American too but I have a sense of humor and felt like adding one more useless post to the thread.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 21 2001 at 5:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) *COUGH* Yeah right. I come back from that god-awful country after whooping your hockey teams in an easy tournament, breathing with relief that I don't have to use your worthless money anymore and that I am back in the US and here I see this post that goes against all logical thinking, becuase, basically, Canada sucks. Dont take it too hard
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 07 2001 at 1:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The entire world except USA uses the Metric system and Cellcius for measuring tempatures, so think well before saying something like that.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 12:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wrong move putting you name and server on there, geez if i read this post and ever saw you, i would bash your name on /ooc till you leave
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 5:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If metric is so retarded, why do both the American Military and the NASA use metric?
#Anonymous, Posted: May 22 2001 at 1:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NASA does not use the metric system. Why do you think the Mars Polar lander fried up in Mars' atmosphere? Answer: some braniac at NASA failed to convert the Metric measurements supplied by European scientists causing a software problem that cost American taxpayers millions of dollars...
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 3:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If that's the way you feel don't come back.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 22 2001 at 12:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) whats your ******* problem? I think almost all americans are like that, they think they are the best. Whos the best hockey player on NHL now at the moment? Mario Lemieux, hes canadian. Its cold so what? Snowboard is so much cooler than surfing... i tried both. and the metric system is SO MUCH BETTER than the english one... And i guess you are republican, weight 250pounds and play EQ all day, oh i just remembered that you play hockey, guess where it comes from? Canada, so **** yo to all the ****** that think like you.
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 13 2001 at 10:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) mario lemieux is one of my favorite players, i was just joking fyi to all you people who are seriously pissed off. i have no problem with canada in fact my best friend is canadian.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 22 2001 at 8:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am just wondering who you are to talk.. If i remember correctly it was someone saying "CANADIANS RULE" that started this. Now.. it that an appropriate thing to say on this type of webpage?
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 10:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HUh you making fun of JEWISH people huh huh ?
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 21 2001 at 11:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Rule what?

Scholar
312 posts
Is a regen spell, but it also roots you. The regen rate is 4/tick instead of 3/tick.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 21 2001 at 3:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL, a tree that is root? What a strange idea! I wonder how it would sounds to see a tree moving around =)
RE: Treeform
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 3:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
HAHA, back in the old days, treeform didn't root you. And yes, it was very weird to see a tree moving across a zone.
On PvP, Treeform is probably one of the best disguises against melee characters.
▲ Page top
RE: Treeform
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 2:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245702628
Scholar
72 posts
Apparently, there is a bug that allows people to be a moving tree. My friend says it involves SoW, treeform, levitate, two people and good timing. I don't know how to do it, but I think it is worth investigating... Can you say Treant form?

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 20 2001 at 12:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I ll keep my drake hide mask :)
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 20 2001 at 1:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Not every item is an uber item you freakin' ******.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 25 2001 at 9:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It's the people that make anonymous posts flaming people that should be shot. If you want to flame someone for giving bad information or for being an *** then go ahead but if someone says nothing more than "I'll keep the mask I got" they don't deserve to be flamed. People like this tick me off. A whole thread about Canada vs USA and you ruin it by yelling at someone for something not related to their nationality. If you called him a frikkin ****** canadian it might have at least been funny but you have serious issues you need to deal with alone in the dark.
